commands.review_summary:
Adds a new bundled `openclaw-governance` plugin scaffold with AIBOM signing, DLP scanning, cost-ledger primitives, config schema, tests, lockfile changes, and deadcode allowlist entries.

PR surface: Source +1597, Tests +150, Config +36, Other +19. Total +1802 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the main PR defects from source inspection: current `main` requires a loadable plugin entry with `register` or `activate`, while the PR entrypoint only has named exports, and the cost ledger visibly omits cache-token pricing. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide whether OpenClaw should bundle this security-sensitive governance plugin before any automated repair lane would be safe.
